resources.string: Hello! I am Venerable Manida, an aspiring Android developer from Mong Ha. I am currently studying Android Development at LMS School for English, Batch 16, where I am continuously improving my programming skills and learning to build creative, real-world mobile applications. I believe technology is a powerful tool to improve lives, and I am passionate about developing applications that are simple, beautiful, and useful. Thank you for supporting my journey in the world of Android development.
